ac_verification.description: OpenAiService.classify() uses Structured Outputs with category enum derived from Firefly category list
ac_verification.evidence: T-0020 adds #buildCategorySchema(categories) building runtime enum [...categories.filter(Boolean), 'UNKNOWN'] and classify() sends response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'transaction_category', strict: true, schema: ... } }

ac_verification.description: Invalid/hallucinated category names cannot be returned (schema enforcement)
ac_verification.evidence: T-0020 enforces enum via json_schema strict:true + additionalProperties:false; removes post-hoc indexOf. T-0022 oai-1 asserts runtime enum on captured request; oai-3 tests UNKNOWN→null mapping.

ac_verification.description: Existing webhook, bulk, and test-webhook paths pass US-0001 regression tests without behavior regression on happy path
ac_verification.evidence: T-0023 runs full bash tests/run-tests.sh; resolveCategory.test.js 4/4 cases use App.createForTest stubs (SDK migration invisible); gate: exit 0 with all tests green.

ac_verification.description: OPENAI_MODEL env still selects model; default remains gpt-4o-mini
ac_verification.evidence: T-0019 constructor migration only changes client init (v3→v4 OpenAI); this.#model field and setModel() allowlist preserved. T-0020 classify() uses this.#model in API call. Architecture spec confirms no model handling changes.
ac_verification.note: No explicit unit test for model selection; acceptable since constructor migration does not touch model field logic.

ac_verification.description: Rate-limit backoff (#retryWithBackoff) still applies on 429 responses
ac_verification.evidence: T-0019 sets maxRetries:0 (disables SDK built-in retry); maps OpenAI.APIError.status→OpenAiException.code for 429. T-0022 oai-5 asserts mock APIError(429) throws with .code===429. T-0023 regression gate confirms #retryWithBackoff still catches 429.

notes: AC-4 has no explicit unit test for model selection; architecture spec confirms constructor migration preserves this.#model and setModel() allowlist.
T-0021 (sibling v4 call path) has no direct AC mapping but is required for shared client consistency (DEC-0010).
All 6 tasks required; dependency chain T-0018→T-0019→{T-0020,T-0021}→T-0022→T-0023 is sound.
